alkylation reagent: alkylated in 55 mM iodoacetamide in 50 mM ABC
fragmentation method: using either CID or HCD, alternatively, in different runs
instrument: an Easy-nLC 1200 coupled to an LTQ Orbitrap™ Velos Pro
labeling: Cells were plated in 96-well plates, with both THP-1 and RAJI cells necessary for all experimental conditions, incubated for 12 h before treatment.
reduction reagent: reduced by sample incubation with 10 mM DTT
